parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if not provided.

get.description: Returns memories relative to the selected date. Day mode returns memories from 1 month, 6 months, and 1 year ago. Week mode returns weekly summaries for the same intervals.

tags.name: Analytics

message.example: Subscription will be canceled at the end of the billing period

dayStateId.description: Day state ID. Pass null to clear the day state.

mainMediaId.description: ID of the media item to use as the day cover. Pass null to clear.

comment.description: Day comment (max 500 chars). Pass null to clear.

url.description: Presigned URL for reading the media file (null if generation failed)

locationName.description: Location name (max 120 chars). Pass null to clear.

latitude.description: Latitude (-90 to 90). Pass null to clear.

longitude.description: Longitude (-180 to 180). Pass null to clear.

size.description: File size in bytes (required, max 50 MB)

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for direct upload to S3

days.description: Exactly 7 days (Mon-Sun), with or without state

averageScore.description: Average mood score for this weekday (0-10)

sampleSize.description: Number of data points for this weekday

averageActivityScore.description: Average activity score for this weekday
